title: Investigate #300 endpoint mismatch - dashboard vs backend
description: Dashboard expects /controls/* endpoints but backend implements simple /settings endpoints per gameplan. Need to align them.

title: UX: What happens if user clicks 'Execute Now' before providing required repository info?
description: During Phase 4 testing, unclear what happens if user executes proactive GitHub issue creation without first providing repository. Should it: 1) Show error message inline? 2) Prompt for repository in modal? 3) Disable Execute button until requirements met? Need to test and document expected behavior.

title: Phase 4.4: Integration & Testing (45 min)
description: Wire into IntentService, add execute endpoint, manual testing (3 scenarios). Evidence: Test document with screenshots.

title: UX: What happens if user provides repository info after clarification request?
description: During Phase 4 testing, unclear what happens when user provides repository info after system requests it. Does it: 1) Retry the action automatically? 2) Show new suggestion? 3) Require user to click Execute again? Need to test and document flow.

title: Bug: Pattern description too vague - shows 'command sequence pattern detected' instead of action details
description: During Phase 4 testing, discovered that suggestion cards show generic 'command sequence pattern detected' message instead of describing what the pattern actually does. Should extract action details from pattern_data and show: 'Create GitHub Issue: Standup Action Item' instead. Fix: Update bot-message-renderer.js renderSuggestionCard() to extract action_type and action_params.title from pattern_data. File: web/assets/bot-message-renderer.js line ~110

title: Phase 4.3: Proactive Suggestions UI (45 min)
description: Add visual distinction for auto-triggered suggestions: ⚡ icon, orange styling, Execute Now button. Evidence: Screenshots + video.

title: Bug: Duplicate suggestions - same pattern shows twice (regular + proactive)
description: During Phase 4 testing, discovered that patterns with confidence=1.0 appear twice in suggestions panel: once as regular (💡 teal, Accept/Reject) and once as proactive (⚡ orange, Execute/Skip/Disable). Root cause: Pattern matches both get_suggestions() threshold (0.7) and get_automation_patterns() threshold (0.9). Fix: Deduplicate by pattern_id in IntentService before combining lists. File: services/intent/intent_service.py

title: UX: How to trigger clarification request (repository needed) - not reproducible
description: During Phase 4 testing, user triggered 'repository not specified' clarification but can't reproduce it now. Need to: 1) Document exact steps that trigger this flow 2) Verify clarification UI is consistent 3) May indicate edge case or race condition

title: EPIC: Phase 4 - Proactive Pattern Application (Simplified)
description: Implement proactive suggestions when patterns reach 0.9+ confidence. User approves before execution (NOT auto-execution). Based on Chief Architect recommendations. 2-3 hours estimated.

title: Debug why suggestion feedback buttons not responding to clicks
description: JavaScript handlers exist (handleSuggestionFeedback in bot-message-renderer.js) but buttons don't respond. Possible causes: 1) Learn More modal blocking clicks, 2) JavaScript error preventing handlers from loading, 3) onclick attribute not being parsed correctly

title: Phase 4.1: Action Registry + Commands (30 min)
description: Create extensible action execution system with Action Registry, BaseCommand, and GithubIssueCommand. Deliverable: 3 files + unit tests. Evidence: Tests passing.

title: Phase 4.2: Context Matcher (30 min)
description: Implement hybrid context matching (temporal + sequential). Deliverable: ContextMatcher class. Evidence: Integration tests passing.

title: Fix #300: Phase 3 suggestion feedback buttons not wired
description: Accept/Reject/Dismiss buttons in suggestion cards have no click handlers. UI exists but JavaScript was never implemented. Blocks #300 manual testing.

title: EPIC: Phase 3 - Pattern Suggestions UI (Thoughtful Colleague)
description: Implement pattern suggestions with collapsed badge UI, suggestion cards, and feedback system. Issue #300 Phase 3. Estimated 5.5 hours total.
notes: Phase 3 complete! Backend integration, frontend UI, feedback endpoint all working. Total time: ~3h vs 5.5h estimate.

title: Phase 3.1: Backend Integration - Wire get_suggestions()
description: Add suggestions field to IntentProcessingResult. Call learning_handler.get_suggestions() in IntentService.process_intent(). Return suggestions in orchestration response. Est: 1 hour.
notes: Backend integration complete. Added suggestions field to IntentProcessingResult, integrated get_suggestions() call in process_intent(), and passed suggestions through HTTP response. Tested and verified suggestions: [] appears in API responses.

title: Phase 3.2: Frontend UI Core - Badge + Panel + Cards
description: Create collapsed notification badge. Build expandable suggestion panel. Implement suggestion cards with confidence bars. Add Accept/Reject/Dismiss buttons. Wire up click handlers. Est: 2 hours.
notes: Frontend UI complete. Badge, panel, cards, confidence bars, and button handlers all implemented. Test pattern created and verified.

title: Phase 3.3: First-Time Onboarding - Tooltip
description: Add first-time user tooltip on badge. Implement learn more modal with explanation. Use localStorage to track seen state. Est: 30 minutes.

title: Phase 3.4: Feedback Endpoint - POST /patterns/{id}/feedback
description: Create PatternFeedbackRequest Pydantic model. Implement POST /patterns/{id}/feedback endpoint. Handle Accept (confidence *= 1.1), Reject (confidence *= 0.5), Dismiss (no change). Update pattern confidence and counts. Est: 1 hour.
notes: Feedback endpoint complete. Accept/Reject/Dismiss actions all working with proper confidence updates.

title: Phase 3.5: Manual Testing - 6 Scenarios
description: Test: (1) Badge appears with patterns (2) Panel expands/collapses (3) Accept increases confidence (4) Reject decreases confidence (5) Dismiss works (6) First-time tooltip shows. Document all evidence. Est: 1 hour.
notes: All manual tests passing. 5/5 core scenarios validated with evidence.

title: Bug: 'Workflow processing completed' message shows when workflow requires clarification (not complete)
description: During Phase 4 testing, when GitHub issue creation fails due to missing repository, UI shows 'Workflow processing completed' but workflow is actually blocked waiting for repository input. This is misleading - workflow is NOT complete. Fix: Update message logic to show 'Waiting for repository specification' or don't show completion message when requires_clarification=True. Also consider: Should clarification be requested BEFORE showing proactive suggestion, not after? Files: Likely in web/assets/bot-message-renderer.js and/or intent result handling
